chunks.text: CYBEAR @ Berkeley | GENCYBER HOME ABOUT SPONSORS GEN CYBER CONTACT US FAQ The GenCyber program provides summer cyber security camp experiences for students and teachers at the K-12 level. The goals of the program are to help all students understand c

the program are to help all students understand correct and safe on-line behavior, increase diversity and interest in cyber security and careers in the cyber security workforce of the Nation, and improve teaching methods for delivering cyber securit

rove teaching methods for delivering cyber security content in K-12 computer science curricula. GenCyber summer camps are hosted by university campuses to expose students to subject matter and cyber problem-solving that will help prepare them for rel
roblem-solving that will help prepare them for related coursework in college.
